message:
test(storage): pin two-stage FTS contract for ft-okhhj

Parallel commit 6a0590d2 shipped the two-stage FTS rewrite (rank then
hydrate) plus the include_highlights toggle, but the test additions
covered only the new selective-startup-sync helper. Two contracts that
the rewrite establishes go uncovered:

  1. include_highlights=Some(false) with include_snippets=Some(true)
     must still populate the snippet column with markers but leave the
     highlight column NULL. This pins the SQL build-time toggle in
     search_fts_hydrate_stage so a refactor that re-introduces the
     highlight() call would surface as a test failure.
  2. The two-stage rank-then-hydrate path must preserve the legacy
     ordering (BM25 score ASC, captured_at ASC, id ASC). A naive
     hydrate-stage that didn't restitch results in rank order would
     silently re-order rows by id; this test catches that.

Both tests run in <0.1s under cargo test storage::fts_search via
scripts/cargo-local.sh; total FTS suite is now 14 → 16 passing.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
